# LaserPay

> LaserPay is a Banking & Payment Technology Engineering company that helps Banks, FinTechs, NBFCs, Payment Aggregators, Payment Gateways, and Enterprises design, build, integrate, launch, and scale digital payment and banking solutions.

LaserPay is not a general software or IT company — it specializes exclusively in banking and payments technology, covering everything from API integrations with banks and payment networks to end-to-end platform development, compliance consulting, certification support, and managed technology services.

## Services

- [Payment Platform Development](https://www.laserpay.in/service-payment-platforms.html): Payment gateways, payment aggregation, orchestration, wallets, UPI, BBPS, escrow, collections, disbursements
- [Banking Solutions](https://www.laserpay.in/service-banking-solutions.html): Internet and mobile banking, digital onboarding, video KYC, corporate banking, digital lending, loan origination
- [API Integrations](https://www.laserpay.in/service-api-integrations.html): Integrations with banks, NPCI, Visa, Mastercard, RuPay, CBS, AML, CKYC, DigiLocker, Aadhaar, UPI, NACH, FASTag, AEPS and more
- [Merchant Enablement](https://www.laserpay.in/service-merchant-enablement.html): Merchant onboarding, PG/PA selection, bank introductions, compliance, certification, go-live support
- [Banking Consulting](https://www.laserpay.in/service-banking-consulting.html): Payment Aggregator licensing guidance, acquiring bank selection, settlement models, RBI compliance guidance
- [Managed Technology Services](https://www.laserpay.in/service-managed-services.html): 24x7 monitoring, cloud infrastructure, DevOps, security, API monitoring, AMC support

## Company

- [Services Overview](https://www.laserpay.in/services.html): Full service portfolio hub page
- [About LaserPay](https://www.laserpay.in/about.html): Positioning, approach, and delivery process
- [Industries We Serve](https://www.laserpay.in/industries.html): Banks, NBFCs, FinTechs, payment aggregators/gateways, insurance, government, enterprises and more
- [Success Stories](https://www.laserpay.in/success-stories.html): Case studies (coming soon)
- [Contact](https://www.laserpay.in/contact.html): Schedule a consultation
